meaning: v.嚼,咀嚼n.一满口,一口,咀嚼物
examples: I can't ketch a fly in there, I can't chaw.
I cant ketch a fly in there, I cant chaw. I got to wear shoes all Sunday.
Maybe Bill he gives him a chaw; maybe he lies and says he ain't got none.
Absent from the honors boards were the names of Nyunt Hlaing, Hla Kyi, Tin Chaw and Kyaw Min.
